task.role: You are a Senior Rust Engineer with expertise in systems programming and APIs. Implement Task 16 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Create Kubernetes manifests and deploy notification router service
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 8, 13, 14, 15 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description:
1. Create Dockerfile with multi-stage build
2. Build Kubernetes Deployment manifest
3. Configure Service and optional Ingress
4. Add ConfigMap for environment variables
5. Set up horizontal pod autoscaling

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-16): Service Deployment and Configuration (Rex - Rust/Axum)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
Service deploys successfully, health checks pass, scales based on load, accessible via Kubernetes service

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
